items.claim: Levy Rodriguez tested positive for nandrolone metabolites.
items.quote: Levy Rodriguez has tested positive for, let me get this right, nandrolone metabolites.

items.claim: Levy Rodriguez has a professional record of 5-0.
Felipe Franco has no wins against fighters with a winning professional record.
items.quote: None of his wins are against experienced fighters. The The These being one fighter who has an over 500 record in professional mixed martial arts.
He has a huge reach 80 in reach.

items.claim: R.J. Harris leaves himself open to being hit when he presses forward for knockouts.
items.quote: he does open himself up to getting hit quite a bit. He has a huge reach 80 in reach. He's 6'6. He's going to tower over Alvin Hines in this fight as Hines is 6'2, but I will tell you RJ Harris is going to get hit

items.claim: R.J. Harris has less than 15 months of professional MMA experience.
items.quote: He made his pro MMA debut 14 months ago. 15 months ago.

items.claim: Alvin Hinds is capable of stuffing takedowns.
items.quote: I don't think Hines' grappling is all that poor either. I think he can definitely, you know, stuff takedowns

items.claim: Seung Hun Co has demonstrated the ability to out-wrestle Oban Elliott and Phil Rowe.
items.quote: Seung Gung Ko's good. I can't lie to you. I mean, you look at his last couple fights, he's been able to out wrestle Oban Elliott. He was able to out wrestle Phil Rowe
